# Pull Request

## ⚠️ Template Selection Required

**Please select the appropriate template based on your change type:**

### 🐛 Bug Fix / Patch Release
If this PR contains bug fixes, maintenance, or small improvements without breaking changes:
**[Use Patch Template](https://github.com/FrankOfTheScience/SkillSwap/compare/development...BRANCH?template=patch.md)**

### ✨ New Feature / Minor Release  
If this PR adds new functionality in a backward-compatible manner:
**[Use Minor Template](https://github.com/FrankOfTheScience/SkillSwap/compare/development...BRANCH?template=minor.md)**

### 💥 Breaking Changes / Major Release
If this PR contains breaking changes that will affect existing functionality:
**[Use Major Template](https://github.com/FrankOfTheScience/SkillSwap/compare/development...BRANCH?template=major.md)**

### 📋 General / Mixed Changes
If this PR contains multiple types of changes or doesn't fit the above categories:
**[Use General Template](https://github.com/FrankOfTheScience/SkillSwap/compare/development...BRANCH?template=general.md)**

---

## Quick Start (If you prefer to continue here)

**Type of Change (select one):**
- [ ] 🐛 Bug Fix (patch)
- [ ] ✨ New Feature (minor) 
- [ ] 💥 Breaking Change (major)
- [ ] 📚 Documentation
- [ ] 🔧 Maintenance

**Summary:**
<!-- Brief description of what this PR does -->


**Testing:**
- [ ] Tests added/updated
- [ ] Manual testing completed
- [ ] All tests pass

**Checklist:**
- [ ] Code follows project standards
- [ ] Self-review completed  
- [ ] Documentation updated if needed
- [ ] Appropriate label added (patch/minor/major)

**Related Issues:**
<!-- Link related issues using "Fixes #123" -->


---

**💡 Tip:** Using the specialized templates above will provide better guidance and help ensure all necessary information is included for your type of change.
